jurisdiction_name: PRECINCT WABASH AND NORTH STAR VILLAGE
narrative:
Precinct Wabash And North Star Village (precinct in Darke County) has 635 registered voters, with 42.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 52.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 47.1 percentage points.
